name: oh-my-logo
description: CLI that renders giant ASCII-art logos with colorful gradients in the terminal.
_commands_note: install is `npm ci` (deterministic; installs the EXACT tree from oracle.lockfile, fails if package.json and the lock disagree). build resolves to `tsc --project tsconfig.json`. test uses `vitest run` (non-watch) rather than package.json's watch-mode `vitest`. Pins/build are PROVEN by Chunk 2, not here.

moduleSurface.note: The oracle tests bind to the rebuilt module by RELATIVE path: `../src/*.js` and `../../src/utils/*.js` (compiled-extension imports of TS sources). cli.test.ts additionally runs the CLI via `npx tsx ../src/index.ts`. Chunk 5 must mount the rebuilt artifact's public surface at these exact paths for imports to resolve.

_devDeps_note: Verbatim copy of package.json devDependencies at the pinned SHA — these are caret RANGES and are NOT deterministic on their own. The authoritative pin is oracle.lockfile (package-lock.json @ SHA); baseline (Chunk 2) and scorer (Chunk 5) MUST `npm ci` against it so they reproduce the identical dep tree. devDeps is recorded here only as a human-readable manifest of the test/build toolchain (build needs `typescript`; the runner needs `vitest` + `tsx`, used by cli.test.ts to exec the CLI from source).

oracle.description: The held-out test surface for oh-my-logo @ the pinned SHA, plus the inputs needed to RUN it deterministically. ONE inventory that drives BOTH capture-withhold (Chunk 3 strips these) AND scorer-run (Chunk 5 runs these). Withholding is glob/file-based, never 'strip the test dir'. Confirmed against the actual layout at the SHA by harness/load-config.mjs --verify (which also asserts HEAD==sha and runs a completeness scan).
oracle._fixtures_snapshots_note: Confirmed empty at this SHA: no fixture files and no `__snapshots__/`/`*.snap` exist; tests are pure (no readFileSync of golden files, no toMatchSnapshot). Conventional vitest snapshot location would be `__tests__/**/__snapshots__/**` — recorded as absent (empty array) rather than as a zero-match glob, so verification stays honest.

excludedTestShaped.reason: Manual, interactive, non-deterministic dev smoke test — NOT part of the automated oracle.
excludedTestShaped.evidence: Not referenced by any package.json script (test cmd is `vitest`, which runs only __tests__/); no CI workflow exists at the SHA (.github/workflows absent); the script uses $RANDOM, emits no assertions/exit codes, and asks a human to eyeball the terminal for corruption ('If you see corrupted characters, the issue persists'). scripts/README.md documents it under 'Development Scripts'. Its deterministic automated counterpart is __tests__/terminal-cleanup.test.ts, which IS inventoried.

expected.note: Expanding the oracle globs against a clean checkout @ SHA must yield EXACTLY these files. The green test count is NOT asserted here — Chunk 2's baseline establishes N/N at the pin (don't take a count on faith).
